title: Hiring Category Manager at Mothercare India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Mothercare India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Mothercare India:
Mothercare India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India!
